title: The Other Side of the Mountain: Part II
original_title: The Other Side of the Mountain: Part II
overview: The Other Side of the Mountain Part 2 is a 1978 film directed by Larry Peerce. It stars Marilyn Hassett and Timothy Bottoms. It is a sequel to The Other Side of the Mountain
